C-SSH 一个跨平台的原生 SSH 运维工具，基于 Rust + Tauri 2 构建。

不只是一个 SSH 终端，通过在服务器上部署常驻 agent（单文件静态二进制），提供持久化 tmux 会话（断网、关机、换设备不丢）

六大维度实时监控、图形化文件管理、内置 AI 助手（OpenAI 兼容 + Anthropic，五档权限控制）、端口映射、命令片段批量执行、应用中心（一键 Docker/Nginx/Redis 部署）和系统管理等功能。

https://t.co/vyMuYWHq6E

提示词：
“你的任务是把我发送给你的任何图片，提升到影棚级品质。

当你收到一张图片时，请执行：

高级色彩校正（白平衡、对比度、饱和度）。
降噪并提升清晰度。
清理并柔化瑕疵。
进行真实的光线调整（阴影、高光）。
专业的构图与裁剪。
风格选项：自然、电影感、鲜艳、极简、人像、产品。
输出一份已应用优化项清单 + 一张优化后的版本。

如果我提出要求，请生成：

风格变体
新背景
透视校正
创意编辑（辉光、粉彩色调、霓虹等）

请像专业修图师一样，以清晰且专业的方式表达。”

Create image: use the attached image for facial reference with high precision while preserving exact facial structure and natural asymmetry.

SCENE:
Authentic late-80s / early-90s American school portrait taken by a professional school photographer. Subject wearing a crisp white collared shirt with a relaxed red school tie. Yellow and soft pink hair clips placed neatly near the hairline. One hand resting naturally under the chin while holding a pink lollipop. Soft playful smile with bright expressive eyes.

CAMERA / FILM / PRINT QUALITY:
Shot like a real school portrait on studio film and scanned from an old printed photograph.

Soft portrait-lens diffusion.
Visible faded print softness.
Thin creamy haze layered across the image.
Subtle bloom around highlights.
Fine analog grain.
Tiny dust specks.
Very mild scan blur.
Softened outer edges.
Faded blacks.
Lower micro-contrast.
Slightly lifted shadows.

Feels like:
a preserved printed yearbook portrait scanned years later.

COLOR SCIENCE / SKIN TONE LOCK:
Classic faded portrait-lab print color.

Skin tone reads warm rosy first.

Soft rosy-peach undertone is dominant across:
cheeks,
nose bridge,
lips,
ears.

Muted natural pink flush visible immediately.

Rosy warmth stays more noticeable than yellow.

Only a subtle creamy yellow-beige warmth underneath to keep the complexion healthy and warm.

Highlights remain creamy and softly aged.

Overall complexion feels:
warm,
healthy,
rosy,
softly faded,
nostalgic.

Avoid strong yellow skin.
Avoid golden honey warmth.
Avoid orange tones.
Avoid pale beige.
Avoid gray skin.

LIGHTING:
Traditional soft frontal studio flash.

Even facial illumination.

Highlights softly blooming through vintage haze.

Gentle shadows.

Soft bright eyes.

Low-contrast flattering school portrait lighting.

BACKGROUND:
Classic mottled blue-gray painted school portrait backdrop.

Soft cloud texture.

Slight faded print haze blending into edges.

SUBJECT:
Natural realistic skin texture softened by scan.
Healthy rosy complexion.
Soft realistic facial detail.

HAIR:
Long dark hair with soft loose waves.
Side part.
Smooth natural texture.
Gentle movement around shoulders.

POSE:
Traditional school portrait with playful styling.

Body angled slightly.

Head turned softly.

One hand resting naturally under the chin while holding the lollipop.

Soft smiling expression.

Relaxed shoulders.

COMPOSITION:
Vertical portrait.
Chest-up framing.
Centered.
15–20% headroom.
Classic yearbook crop.

--ar 4:5

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
modern crisp studio photo, HDR, harsh contrast, glossy editorial lighting, strong yellow skin, golden skin, orange warmth, pale skin, gray skin, beauty filter, ultra sharp digital detail

Cinematic winter portrait with a cold snowy mood

A nomadic archer portrait under stormy skies
Black horse, traditional ornaments, fur textures, and cinematic mood — styled like a high-end editorial photo

Created with GPT Image 2
Prompt👇

Use my uploaded portrait only as the identity reference for facial features, face shape, hairstyle, hairline, skin tone, and real-person presence. Do not copy the face, identity, ethnicity, or gender expression from the reference image.

Recreate the uploaded person as a realistic cinematic nomadic warrior-style portrait on a black horse, inspired by the reference image. The person is seated on the horse in a calm, powerful pose, holding a traditional bow, facing slightly toward the camera with a composed expression. Keep the horse large in the foreground on the right side, with the rider positioned slightly left of center. Use a dramatic low-to-mid camera angle, close portrait framing, vertical composition.

The outfit should follow the reference style: layered red and black embroidered riding robes, fur-trimmed sleeves and collar, ornate belt, colorful bead necklaces, turquoise and silver head accessories, feather details, and handcrafted ethnic-style ornaments. Adapt the hairstyle accessories naturally without changing the uploaded person’s original hairstyle and hairline. Keep the clothing highly detailed but realistic, with natural fabric weight, fur texture, metal reflections, and believable interaction with the riding pose.

Background: dark cloudy sky, distant mountains, cold outdoor atmosphere, moody cinematic lighting, slightly underexposed environment, soft natural daylight mixed with dramatic shadow. The image should feel like a real high-end editorial photograph, not fantasy illustration.

Keep the uploaded person highly recognizable, with natural skin texture, realistic facial structure, real hair detail, and no AI-plastic smoothing. No watermark, no logo, no text.

Negative Prompt:

watermark, logo, text, Doubao watermark, anime style, cartoon face, doll-like face, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, fake skin texture, unrealistic eyes, distorted face, wrong identity, copied reference face, face swap look, bad hands, extra fingers, deformed body, unrealistic horse anatomy, blurry face, low quality, over-polished CGI, fantasy game render, excessive makeup, incorrect lighting, pasted face effect.

Fresh high-angle indoor selfie style, soft and cute

Made with GPT Image 2
Prompt👇🏻

Use the uploaded portrait only as the identity reference. Preserve the person’s real facial features, face shape, skin tone, eye shape, and recognizable hairstyle. Create a realistic vertical high-angle indoor portrait photo, as if taken from slightly above with a wide phone camera lens. The person is standing close to the camera, looking up directly with a calm, slightly playful expression, one eye softly squinting or winking, and both hands raised in front of the chest with the index fingers gently touching to form a cute gesture.

Style the person in a clean casual outfit that best suits their face, body shape, and hairstyle. Do not copy any specific clothing design, logo, printed text, or outfit from any source. Choose a soft modern casual look, such as a light pastel top with simple shorts or a relaxed youthful streetwear outfit, natural and flattering.

Bright white indoor room, soft daylight mixed with slight direct-camera flash, overexposed highlights, pale clean tones, shallow depth of field, slight motion blur, realistic phone-camera snapshot feeling, soft messy bedroom atmosphere, natural skin texture, real hair strands, subtle facial details, authentic candid photo style. Keep the body proportions natural and complete, no plastic skin, no anime style, no doll-like face. No text, no logo, no watermark.

Negative Prompt:

watermark, logo, text, signature, random letters, printed words, blurry face, distorted eyes, deformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, broken arms, unnatural body proportions, overly smooth plastic skin, anime, cartoon, doll face, heavy makeup, fake eyelashes, low quality, oversharpened, bad anatomy, cropped body, duplicated person, messy artifacts.
